comments.author: Ben McCash
comments.text: Phase 3 backend complete: audit_runner.py (6 issue types, WS streaming), beets_fixer.py (fetchart/fix_albumartist/fix_tracknums/unify_mbids/delete_album), routers wired. Pushed in commit 52006c9.

title: Frontend Phase 2: Import page — browser, console, low-confidence UI

comments.author: Ben McCash
comments.text: Downloads browser must handle artist→album two-level tree. Root shows artist dirs; clicking an artist expands album subdirs. Both levels selectable for import.

title: Repo bootstrap: CLAUDE.md, gitignore, docker-compose skeleton

comments.author: Ben McCash
comments.text: Phase 3 frontend complete: full CleanerPage with IssueGroup+IssueCard components, useAuditState with selection+fix state, WS path bug fixed (imports too). Pushed in commit 52006c9.

title: Backend Phase 2: beets importer + WebSocket bridge (Feature 1)

comments.author: Ben McCash
comments.text: Music library structure: ~/data/media/music/<artist>/<album>/. Downloads in ~/data/downloads/completed/music/ follow same pattern pre-import. Sample artists: .Vril, 00110100 01010100, 100 gecs, 33EMYBW, 7038634357, 96 Back etc — includes special chars, numbers-as-names, dots.

title: Docker: multi-stage build, server deployment, volume verification
